text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Eve, and the racing world is abuzz
with talk on a certain topic.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Did you see Oguri Cap and Tamamo Cross's
race?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Of course I did! But Super Creek ran great too!
She really cut into their showdown!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see what all those high-level
Umamusume do in next year's Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
The news is making a huge deal out of it too!
They're calling them the Top Three and saying
they're the representatives of this generation...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, but I heard Tamamo Cross might retire
from the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've alway hadda light appetite, but now I'm
gettin' fuller even faster. And my legs've been
weirdly heavy lately, so I'm takin' a break.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
To be honest with ya, this might be it for me... My
body could be tryin' to tell me, "Hey, you're done
here."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Welp, that's the life of an athlete. Ya always
gotta know when to call it quits, and listen to
your body when it comes to what to do next.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I saw that interview online, but I'm definitely
gonna miss her if she really decides to retire. She
was doing so well too...
Hey, you two!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you forgetting someone?! Namely, Inari
One, the Umamusume who's gonna bring glory to
her hometown of Oi!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah, Inari! Win a bunch of G1s next year and
make it your year!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
If you beat both Oguri and Creek, you'll be the
real GOAT!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You bet! But don't just cheer for me from behind the screen! Come to the racecourse and watch me run live!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll send you all off in a blaze of Edo wildfire!
Watch as I take the world by storm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The new year comes, bringing along a new era
with it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even now, strong Umamusume keep taking the
stage, and one can't help but wonder who will be
the one to lead the next generation.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, did you see Tamamo's interview
online?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What a surprise, right? Time really waits for no
one.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It just keeps ticking onward... and everything
keeps changing.
choice_data_list: But your feelings haven't changed, have they?
But your feelings haven't changed, have they?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Not at all! They're the same as ever.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
In fact, why don't we set our motivation in stone
right now with a New Year's resolution?!
choice_data_list: Health comes first! No overtraining this year!
Let's go back to the basics and grow even more!
Time to learn a new skill that'll beat everyone!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A-are you still angry with me for secretly solo
training before the Satsuki Sho?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I already told you I won't do it again!
Please don't look at me like that!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I promise! I'll even swear it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a little bit of chatting and teasing, Sakura
Chiyono O and I make our wishes for the new
year.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff. Hm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this is the perfect time to break out my
Chiyonotes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I wrote down all my strengths and
weaknesses you told me about in here.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Do you want to see my weaknesses?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I suppose you already know what they are,
though. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a little bit of chatting and teasing, Sakura
Chiyono O and I make our wishes for the new
year.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff. Hm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A new skill that can beat everyone? Hm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hi-yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hwahhh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
H-how was that? I tried putting my all into it like
Yaeno...
choice_data_list: I guess it was all right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Haha... That's exactly what Yaeno told me when
she was teaching me self defense a while back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a little bit of chatting and teasing, Sakura
Chiyono O and I make our wishes for the new
year.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff. Hm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Is that the scent of takoyaki in the air? I can smell
the sauce and bonito flakes together...
choice_data_list: Want to check out the food stalls?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! N-no, it's okay! I'm not hungry, so don't
worry about it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, let's hurry up and get back. I'm
just itching to run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creak...

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
...Ardan. Are you secretly doing rehab all on your
own again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry. I just want to get better.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
I understand, but even if the exercises you're
doing are gentle, they won't help you heal any
faster.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'm... aware of that.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
If you are, then please listen to our advice on how
to recover as quickly as possible.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
We serve the Mejiro family. We are your arms,
legs, and mind. Don't hesitate to ask us for help.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from the academy, Sakura
Chiyono O suddenly stops in her tracks.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Nothing! I was just thinking... the hospital where
Ardan's being treated is pretty close to here.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Do you think she watched me run? She must've
done, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...No. I can't just assume she was watching.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I have to run well enough that she'll have no
choice but to notice me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's motivation sticks with her
even after she makes it back to the academy.
